name: redirector-rewrite
description: Clean and lightweight rewrite of the Redirector browser extension in Manifest V3.

scripts.package: rm -f dist/redirector-rewrite.zip && mkdir -p dist && cd src && zip -r ../dist/redirector-rewrite.zip . -x '*.DS_Store'
scripts.publish:firefox: npx web-ext sign --source-dir src --artifacts-dir dist --channel listed --api-key $AMO_JWT_ISSUER --api-secret $AMO_JWT_SECRET

author: pngdeity
